reviews.review_description: I don’t mean this in a mean way at all but don’t buy the game. I was hyped up thinking this was gonna be a vr version of the game that was fun to play for hours but for $25 dollars it’s so bugged I couldn’t even make it past the first car, tools disappear and items are unable to be interacted with. This game is not the same as console or pc release, please save your money.

First of all you can’t even get the car to lift second of all too many glitches third of all it sucks don’t get this game
It’s a rip off in your waste all your money￼
￼
Je qui fonctionne pas dû tout nul

reviews.review_title: Please give me my money back
reviews.review_description: So I paid 1799 cuz I put in a discount in Nicole have a return policy or you can return it and I want to return it after I played it for 1 hour and y'all didn't give me my money back so give me a back right now
Car macanic sim VR is cool they fixed it and  improved it it's cool but better on console like PlayStation other than that it's good

As much as I love playing the original game on PC and console I also love sandbox because it allows players to mess around have fun and enjoy the game but this game it's buggy, glitchy and just a mess in general and it's the same stuff 24/7. So devs pls take my review into consideration and add sandbox.
Very little information on what to do and over all just not a good game
I can only play for like 10 minutes before the game crashes and I have the quest 3s

reviews.review_title: Would be 0 if I could make it
reviews.review_description: There are so many bugs and glitches that it is unplayable. Eventually, in the game, the glitches are so bad that there is no progression possible.
there are too many bugs. This game has potential but theres way too many bugs, made the game unplayable
I love this game it is really fun but there are too many bugs to actually play the game
Please add trucks to this game other than that i love this game

reviews.review_title: Nothing like the pc version,so many bugs
reviews.review_description:
So many bugs the devs dont even look at.. 
-tools phase through the ground after not being places in hoist
-the car showroom merges multiple cars while selecting through 
-cant even buy any cars in the game to fix or even use at the dealership
-in the car showroom cant scroll down in the car viewer
-no junkyard to buy cars from unlike in car mechanic 2
-the bolt facing upward on the front suspension arm cannot be undone while the car is lowered so then when the car is lifted in the air the bolt is unreachable 
-no performance parts unlike car mechanic simulator 2
-the physics feel really buggy in general 
-poor graphics 

It just feel like the devs have made an pathetic excuse for a mechanic vr game,bugs are never fixed..

I thought it would be a good fun game but i my character glitched and somehow managed to just remove the front windshield and it vanished. I went into my inventory to try to remove it then spawn it back in but there wasnt a button for the windshield or any of the windows. My only option was to sell it and buy another but even that didnt work. Im not gonna refund in the hopes that you fix this slight issue plssss it was a really fun game until this point.
It glitches a lot and I can't get my money back
It is a great game it is just the price is a little to much I would understand maybe 15 dollars would be ok
Very buggy and just a bad game
i cant get my money back and my brother buy it without my permission!

reviews.review_title: Too many glitches, Not enough content
reviews.review_description: I love this game and would play it every day, but now I'm waiting for the next update. I noticed some weird glitches on the second order, such as the front tires not connecting back after removal, and the I4 turbocharger pipe not going back on after removal, and we could also use more features from Mechanic simulator 2018,  such as, driving, purchasing your own cars, barn finds and auctions,  interior customization, upgraded parts, car dealership, more cars and dlc, bringing back jeep and Mazda, garage expansion, sandbox, overall 5 stars worth every penny these are just a few issues I've been having
I am currently learning about mechanics and it is the most accurate other than beamng but overall better than most other games.
This game would be amazing but it’s very unplayable. Very disappointed

Listen its a beautiful game, but I'm a diesel mechanic and I want to work on big boy diesel trucks in VR , I hope y'all add them soon or at least bring truck mechanic simulator to VR , I feel like this should go without saying

I purchased this game for my son and he really enjoyed it until it glitched and wouldn’t let him put a part back on a car or whatever. Now the app doesn’t work at all. Can’t get past the main menu. Probably going to request a refund.
Really glitchy fix that and it will be 5

I loved Car Machanic Simulator on the playstation so when I saw there was a VR version I bought it without hesitation. I wish I'd played the free trail first because I found it unplayable. The menu was unresponsive a lot of the time, the movement so janky it would just stop working entirely and I couldn't even get through the tutorial as it wouldn't let me remove the oil filter no matter what I tried. Hope it works better for other people but I am really disappointed because the environments looked great and the original game is amazing.
But it need sandbox mode

After playing the pc side of this game and having next to zero issues I decided to give this a try. The big "20 minute" trial was enough for me to buy the game as I encountered no issues in that time.....Was I ever wrong. I'm stuck on a level where I've replaced a part but it shows as not changed, controls are clunky, menus on the tablet lag so hard it takes two minutes to find a part by search. Some parts stay on the car after being "removed" it's just a clunky glitchy mess. Sadly it's past the refund stage so I'm stuck with a half working title.

developer_response.body:
Hello thibodac

Thank you for your feedback. We’re sorry to hear your expectations for this purchase were not met. Tell us, please, which level you are stuck on? 
We would like to reproduce your problem and fix it. We thank you for your time and for sharing your thoughts.

Best regards,
GameFormatics Team

reviews.review_title: I have great experience with this game
reviews.review_description: I like how you can take everything apart and learn how to fix a car

Not a great start, bought this for my son, he can’t reach underneath the car as the lift only has two buttons, up and down so when he puts the car up it is to high for some unknown reason he can’t reach to do anything, very frustrated he even started to stand on the bed to play which is very dangerous… not happy 

If you can help with this please do. I have a very upset young man as he wants to play it but can’t

developer_response.body:
Hello GeorgieP22

We apologize for the inconvenience. We will forward this issue to the development team and see what we can do to allow your young man to play at his current height!
Thank you very much for your time and feedback.

Best regards,
GameFormatics Team

reviews.review_description: The game is pretty substantial however you can’t use many tools, most jobs become a bolt and unbolt simulator and it’s really hard to navigate buggy UI and often you can get soft locked. I probably regret this purchase the most of any vr purchase I’ve made.

developer_response.body:
We’re really sorry to hear about your frustration with the game. We appreciate your feedback regarding the limited tool usage, UI navigation issues, and soft locking. These are important points, and we’re actively working on improving them in future updates.

We hope you’ll continue to give the game a chance as we work to fix these bugs and enhance the overall experience. Please feel free to reach out to us at business@gameformatic.com if you need further assistance.

reviews.review_description:
Tried to set up the game and it is slow and clunky.  Got stuck on the tablet settings unable to leave . Stuck on floor when trying to play 

There is very little control when trying  position player and menu controls are like something from the 90s .
To turn the music off you have to scroll all the way to 100 then it starts at 0 . 
Game starts and you are in the floor.
Not worth buying. It is more like how vr game doesn't work simulator

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We're sorry to hear about your experience with the game. It sounds like you've encountered some frustrating issues, and we truly want to help make things right for you.

We would love to assist you in resolving these problems and improving your experience. Could you please join our official Discord server? Our team is active there and can provide direct support to address these issues.

Here’s the link to our Discord: https://discord.gg/TWfszdEJ

Your input is invaluable in helping us improve, and we appreciate your patience as we work to make the game better.

Thank you for giving us a chance to assist!

Best regards,
PM

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing don't no why so many bad comments yes it have few bugs but if you wait few seconds it fixed itself
This game is glitchy and I can’t get a refund because I purchased it in app.  I’m so mad I wasted the money

developer_response.body: We’re sorry to hear about your experience and frustration. Please reach out to us at business@gameformatic.com, and we’ll do our best to assist you and address any issues you’ve encountered in the game.

reviews.review_description: What a waste of money
How do you get biggarage

I can't get off the floor. I try to do the laser thing in the tutorial and get stuck to the floor with no button doing anything to help me. I do want a refund, but if there's anyone who can help me, that would be great.
Waste of money.  Freezes up,  controls don't work,  please fix

developer_response.body:
Hello Irishtreeguy

We apologize for the inconvenience. Could you please provide more details on which part of the controls you have trouble with? And when does your game freeze? We would like to investigate the issue and fix it.

reviews.review_description: It glitches sometimes and I lost all my progress :(

Good game to chill and play, but the game works and then it doesn't because of bugs. I had to uninstall and install again to finish the first 2 jobs because of those bugs.
Job 1:
I accidently took off a front bumper and I couldn't get the license plate back on the bumper.
Then hood wouldn't go back in place just stayed sitting on top of the engine bay.
Job 2:
The NEW camshaft I was installing disappeared upon installation.
No hood bug though.
Job 3:
Hood bug came back.
Was installing the radiator housing and it bugged out, the fan wouldn't go back into place. Instead it kept falling on the floor, same as the housing cover and anytime I would move around they would be on the floor following me.
On top that I wanted to see if I could put them in my inventory, then take them back out to see if it would fix the bug. That didn't work because the inventory page bugged out as well showing a blank screen.

I feel like the developers did not actually test this game before they released it.

I like this game, but the bugs just don't make it worth it at all and I WANT A REFUND. Since it is NOT my fault I can't enjoy the game. I like the concept and I enjoyed it until the bugs just kept coming back no matter how many times I un-installed and reinstalled the game. I even tried using the refresh button in the garage and that did absolutely NOTHING.

reviews.review_title: This game is for patient people
reviews.review_description: The game is really fun and realistic and a lot of people have no patience seeing the other reviews they give the game a lot of hate for no reason and yes their are some bugs and glitches but the developer just needs more time, I am a programmer too and I know how hard a game can be.You just have to be patient and have fun

reviews.review_title: Some problems that should be fixed
reviews.review_description: I really like the game and recommend to anyone but definitely need to fix the rims and add a width and I have all the parts to replace the front shocks but it won’t let me combine them even tho they are the exact same pieces I took out just new pls fix so I can actually get progress

developer_response.body:
Hi golopros1357, 

Thank you for your review of the game. We appreciate your feedback and are glad you are enjoying the game. 
Regarding the issue with replacing the front shocks, it is important to note that some car models may require the use of a shock absorber removal tool to safely and correctly remove the old shocks and install the new ones. 

Hope this will help. Please let us know. You can talk with us directly on Discord -  DISCORD: https://discord.gg/j4ySVzdCYQ

EDIT:
Hey again golopros1357, 
Because you mentioned how much you enjoy our game, we're reaching out to let  you know that the latest update has been released. Give it a go and let us know your thoughts :)

reviews.review_description: I’ve played this game on different platforms this is the 1st time I’ve played it in VR the Graphics is good. It does seem to have a few bugs in the controls. The Tutorial￼ could use a little more work for new plays. All in all it’s a great fun game to spend some time on.￼

developer_response.body:
Thanks, criss.seaboltii,
We're glad you're having fun with the game. Stop by to our Discord channel. Regards

reviews.review_title: Glad this has come to vr …
reviews.review_description:
However it needs some tweaks. Its nearly impossible to read the text on the ipad and menus no matter how large you scale it. I also cant find a way to hide the ipad meaning if I press the wrong button it moves to where I am and blocks my view. I then have to teleport to another location and call it over there before i can continue what i was doing. So an option to hide it would be great. 
I also noticed while teleporting if you are holding something It drops the item on the floor such as removing at wheel and carrying it over to the wheel balancer. Sometimes tools you drop end up just disappearing it would be good if they appeared back on your tool belt rather than having to reset the room.

developer_response.body:
Hi Teamironfoot,
Thanks so much for your feedback 💪 its all important. I will pass it all to our dev team. Just to let you know another "small" update is coming and will fix problem with small text. You will see improvement in no time :) in the meantime if you want to you can join our discord chanel to talk directly with our team. Thanks and regards
https://discord.gg/j4ySVzdCYQ

reviews.review_title: First car, oil filter faulty bug?
reviews.review_description:
I really like this game, but the first car is a yellow Volksw
agen. You need to change the air filter , standard b tires and change the oil. All good except the oil mission.. I drained the old oil, put in new oil. No good.. it says faulty oil filter.. so I changed the oil filter (blue) no luck.. I started a new game for 3 times .. all the same.. I cannot close the order.. or start a new one....someone please please HELP!?

developer_response.body:
hey,
Please visit our Discord server. On the Car Mechanic Simulator channel, check out the feedback section. Our QA Lead has uploaded some instructional videos of the first missions there. We hope this will help. We hope this will help and you will evaluate our game better.
DISCORD: https://discord.gg/j4ySVzdCYQ

EDIT:
Hi again The_Going_Dutch, 
Just wanted to give you a heads up that we've released a brand new update!
We really think you should give it another shot and try it out now. We're super excited to hear what you think about it, so please don't hesitate to share your feedback. Let us know what you think! :)
